hero.title: Find Your Place to Call Home
hero.subtitle: Browse hundreds of curated listings across Maplewood, Harborside, and Riverside. Expert agents, transparent process, exceptional results.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search by neighborhood, address, or ZIP

featured.title: Handpicked Listings
featured.subtitle: Our agents have curated these exceptional properties across the area's most sought-after neighborhoods.

services.title: Full-Service Real Estate
services.subtitle: From your first search to closing day, Harborview Realty is with you at every step.
services.buyDesc: We match you with properties that fit your lifestyle and budget, then guide you through every offer, inspection, and closing.
services.sellDesc: Professional staging advice, strategic pricing, and a network of qualified buyers to get you the best possible outcome.
services.rentDesc: Curated rental listings with flexible terms. We handle tenant screening, lease prep, and move-in coordination.
services.investDesc: Market analysis, cap rate calculations, and off-market opportunities for investors seeking strong returns.

agents.title: Your Local Experts
agents.subtitle: Our agents live and work in the communities they serve, bringing genuine local knowledge to every transaction.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from real people who found their homes with Harborview Realty.

newsletter.title: Get New Listings First
newsletter.subtitle: Join over 2,400 subscribers who receive curated property alerts, market updates, and neighborhood guides every week.

cta.subtitle: Schedule a free consultation with one of our expert agents today.

hero.title: Built on Trust, Driven by Results
hero.subtitle: Since 2009, we have helped thousands of families buy, sell, and rent homes across Maplewood and the surrounding communities.

story.title: Our Story
story.body1: Harborview Realty was founded with a simple belief: real estate should feel personal. We started as a small team of three agents who knew every street, every school district, and every hidden gem in Maplewood.
story.body2: Today, we are a full-service agency with over 20 agents, but our commitment to the community has never changed. Every client receives the same attentive, honest service that built our reputation.

values.title: What Sets Us Apart
values.integrityDesc: We give you honest advice, even when it is not what you want to hear. Your long-term trust matters more than any single transaction.
values.localDesc: Our agents live in the neighborhoods they serve. That local knowledge translates into better deals and smarter decisions for you.
values.resultsDesc: We measure success by your satisfaction. Our track record of 98% client satisfaction speaks for itself.
values.careDesc: You are never just a file number. We take time to understand your goals and tailor our approach to your unique situation.

team.title: The People Behind the Results
team.subtitle: Experienced, dedicated, and genuinely passionate about helping you find the right home.

cta.title: Let's Find Your Next Home Together
cta.subtitle: Reach out today for a free, no-obligation consultation with one of our expert agents.

hero.title: We'd Love to Hear From You
hero.subtitle: Whether you are buying, selling, or just exploring, our team is ready to help.
